Text.Page:
Crafting for the War Effort

Support the federation war effort by crafting metal hauberks!
Rukeb in Habere has Muhrak's armor design. They need it at the Kaiator workshop. Can you handle the pickup and delivery?
Take this to the Kaiator workshop as quickly as possible. It's one of Muhrak's designs—very special.
Thanks. As long as you're here, get to work and make some of those.
